content:
SOP: SOP-GEN-0001 | Joint: ENGINE_MOUNT_REAR_RIGHT | Vehicle: Sedan-X
Station: INTERIOR_ST-08 | Recommended Tool: MANUAL_WRENCH
Method: Torque+Angle | Safety-Critical: Yes
Target: 85 Nm +/- 5 Nm | Pre-torque: 40 Nm | Angle: 30 degrees
Procedure:
  1. Ensure mating surfaces and threads are clean
  2. Install fastener by hand and verify alignment
  3. Pre-tighten to 40 Nm
  4. Final tighten to 85 Nm ± 5 Nm
  5. Further tighten by 30 degrees
  6. Verify torque (and angle if applicable) in the MES
Warnings:
  - Do not reuse torque-to-yield or stretch bolts after removal
Last Revision: 2026-02-16

SOP: SOP-GEN-0013 | Joint: WHEEL_LUG_NUT_FR | Vehicle: Truck-T
Station: FINAL_ASSY_ST-22 | Recommended Tool: MANUAL_WRENCH
Method: TorqueOnly | Safety-Critical: Yes
Target: 120 Nm +/- 10 Nm
Procedure:
  1. Ensure mating surfaces and threads are clean
  2. Install fastener by hand and verify alignment
  3. Tighten in star pattern
  4. Apply final torque of 120 Nm ± 10 Nm

Warnings:
  - Uneven tightening may cause wheel distortion; re-check pattern
